TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Amis Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://ami.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_ami, title = {Amis Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://ami.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: == Katop == O tatapangan a lengaw itiniay i Filipin, Inni ato ka'amisan, Sawalian ato satimolan no Taywan, itini i Fotod iraay a molengaw. Tata'angay ,takaraw a mo'ecel ko tapang no kilang,masasifoday ko lamit i tatapangan,makorahay a koheting ko tolak.o ca'ang ko'engelay kohera a kahengang to mamang,ira ko mahapinangay a konis no papah.masanofita'olay ko a faco no papah a matatamay miketing i ca'ang, cifanohay ko tafedo' a papah,ma'ikes to i,marasrasay kina fanoh no papah. O ta'edaw no papah ira ko 10~17cm, dadahal no papah ira ko 5~8cm.itiraay i kakiri'an no papah a cifalo, 'enemay ko pangpang no falo, kakahad no falo ira ko 1cm, fanohongay.o heci matamosolay matiyaay o tamosolay-mali.o kakaya' no heci ira ko 3.5~4.5cm, o kakahad no heci ira ko 1~2cm, ilaloma' no heci ira ko 1~3 a masatoriyaday a pa'eno. Konian heci kohetingay ifati'ian koheraay ko cengel. I kacangalahan ko kacifaloan, i karafawfawaan ko kacihecian. Piraoy no Finacadan Malenakay i pa'eneray a tongroh no riyar, cowa kacifao, Tata'angay ,takaraw a mo'ecel, masamihecaan ko kalangdaw orasaka, malopatih I salawacan no riyar mitaker to fali.O tahapinangan no Kbalan a finacadan. Adihay heca mapaloma i lawac no lalan, taliyok no loma', o heci manga'ay a kaenen. Ma'edengan ko kako'esit ko tapang no kilang, orasaka, tada matatodongay sapisanga' to dafong no loma', o Tao-finacadan itini i Fotod o sapisanga' to tamina, o tolak o sapicengel to salil, o heci kahemaway o hasa pawpaw.Ira ko cinganganay tonini a ngasaw no 'Amis o Cikatopay hananay, yo herek no lalood I Cepo' I 1878 mihecaan maliposak oasitimol maro' i Tapowaray,Makerahay,Ciwkangan, Sa'aniwan ato Madawdaw. == Pacefaday a Tilid ==
S.PHON: == kato~up == o~u tatapaŇčan a …ĺ…ôŇčaw itiniaj i fi…ĺipin, inni ato~u ka °amisan, sawa…ĺian ato~u satimo~u…ĺan no~u tajwan, itini i fo~uto~u…¨~…ģ iraaj a mo~u…ĺ…ôŇčaw. tata °aŇčaj ,takaraw a mo~u °…ô ¶…ô…ĺ ko~u tapaŇč no~u ki…ĺaŇč,masasifo~u…¨~…ģaj ko~u …ĺamit i tatapaŇčan,mako~urańßaj a ko~uńß…ôtiŇč ko~u to~u…ĺak.o~u ¶a °aŇč ko~u °…ôŇč…ô…ĺaj ko~uńß…ôra a kańß…ôŇčaŇč to~u mamaŇč,ira ko~u mańßapinaŇčaj a ko~unis no~u papańß.masano~ufita °o~u…ĺaj ko~u a fa ¶o~u no~u papańß a matatamaj mik…ôtiŇč i ¶a °aŇč, ¶ifano~uńßaj ko~u taf…ô…¨~…ģo~u ° a papańß,ma °ik…ôs to~u i,marasrasaj kina fano~uńß no~u papańß. o~u ta °…ô…¨~…ģaw no~u papańß ira ko~u **~** ¶m, …¨~…ģa…¨~…ģańßa…ĺ no~u papańß ira ko~u *~* ¶m.itiraaj i kakiri °an no~u papańß a ¶ifa…ĺo~u, °…ôn…ômaj ko~u paŇčpaŇč no~u fa…ĺo~u, kakańßa…¨~…ģ no~u fa…ĺo~u ira ko~u * ¶m, fano~uńßo~uŇčaj.o~u ńß…ô ¶i matamo~uso~u…ĺaj matijaaj o~u tamo~uso~u…ĺaj-ma…ĺi.o~u kakaja ° no~u ńß…ô ¶i ira ko~u *.*~*.* ¶m, o~u kakańßa…¨~…ģ no~u ńß…ô ¶i ira ko~u *~* ¶m, i…ĺa…ĺo~uma ° no~u ńß…ô ¶i ira ko~u *~* a masato~urija…¨~…ģaj a pa °…ôno~u. ko~unian ńß…ô ¶i ko~uńß…ôtiŇčaj ifati °ian ko~uńß…ôraaj ko~u ¶…ôŇč…ô…ĺ. i ka ¶aŇča…ĺańßan ko~u ka ¶ifa…ĺo~uan, i karafawfawaan ko~u ka ¶ińß…ô ¶ian. pirao~uj no~u fina ¶a…¨~…ģan ma…ĺ…ônakaj i pa °…ôn…ôraj a to~uŇčro~uńß no~u rijar, ¶o~uwa ka ¶ifao~u, tata °aŇčaj ,takaraw a mo~u °…ô ¶…ô…ĺ, masamińß…ô ¶aan ko~u ka…ĺaŇč…¨~…ģaw o~urasaka, ma…ĺo~upatińß i sa…ĺawa ¶an no~u rijar mitak…ôr to~u fa…ĺi.o~u tańßapinaŇčan no~u kb~b~va…ĺan a fina ¶a…¨~…ģan. a…¨~…ģińßaj ńß…ô ¶a mapa…ĺo~uma i …ĺawa ¶ no~u …ĺa…ĺan, ta…ĺijo~uk no~u …ĺo~uma °, o~u ńß…ô ¶i maŇča °aj a ka…ôn…ôn. ma °…ô…¨~…ģ…ôŇčan ko~u kako~u °…ôsit ko~u tapaŇč no~u ki…ĺaŇč, o~urasaka, ta…¨~…ģa matato~u…¨~…ģo~uŇčaj sapisaŇča ° to~u …¨~…ģafo~uŇč no~u …ĺo~uma °, o~u tao~u-fina ¶a…¨~…ģan itini i fo~uto~u…¨~…ģ o~u sapisaŇča ° to~u tamina, o~u to~u…ĺak o~u sapi ¶…ôŇč…ô…ĺ to~u sa…ĺi…ĺ, o~u ńß…ô ¶i kańß…ômawaj o~u ńßasa pawpaw.ira ko~u ¶iŇčaŇčanaj to~unini a Ňčasaw no~u °amis o~u ¶ikato~upaj ńßananaj, jo~u ńß…ôr…ôk no~u …ĺa…ĺo~uo~u…¨~…ģ i ¶…ôpo~u ° i **** mińß…ô ¶aan ma…ĺipo~usak o~uasitimo~u…ĺ maro~u ° i tapo~uwaraj,mak…ôrańßaj, ¶iwkaŇčan, sa °aniwan ato~u ma…¨~…ģaw…¨~…ģaw. == pa ¶…ôfa…¨~…ģaj a ti…ĺi…¨~…ģ ==
S.FORM: == Katop == O tatapangan a lengaw itiniay i Filipin, Inni ato ka'amisan, Sawalian ato satimolan no Taywan, itini i Fotod iraay a molengaw. Tata'angay ,takaraw a mo'ecel ko tapang no kilang,masasifoday ko lamit i tatapangan,makorahay a koheting ko tolak.o ca'ang ko'engelay kohera a kahengang to mamang,ira ko mahapinangay a konis no papah.masanofita'olay ko a faco no papah a matatamay miketing i ca'ang, cifanohay ko tafedo' a papah,ma'ikes to i,marasrasay kina fanoh no papah. O ta'edaw no papah ira ko 10~17cm, dadahal no papah ira ko 5~8cm.itiraay i kakiri'an no papah a cifalo, 'enemay ko pangpang no falo, kakahad no falo ira ko 1cm, fanohongay.o heci matamosolay matiyaay o tamosolay-mali.o kakaya' no heci ira ko 3.5~4.5cm, o kakahad no heci ira ko 1~2cm, ilaloma' no heci ira ko 1~3 a masatoriyaday a pa'eno. Konian heci kohetingay ifati'ian koheraay ko cengel. I kacangalahan ko kacifaloan, i karafawfawaan ko kacihecian. Piraoy no Finacadan Malenakay i pa'eneray a tongroh no riyar, cowa kacifao, Tata'angay ,takaraw a mo'ecel, masamihecaan ko kalangdaw orasaka, malopatih I salawacan no riyar mitaker to fali.O tahapinangan no Kbalan a finacadan. Adihay heca mapaloma i lawac no lalan, taliyok no loma', o heci manga'ay a kaenen. Ma'edengan ko kako'esit ko tapang no kilang, orasaka, tada matatodongay sapisanga' to dafong no loma', o Tao-finacadan itini i Fotod o sapisanga' to tamina, o tolak o sapicengel to salil, o heci kahemaway o hasa pawpaw.Ira ko cinganganay tonini a ngasaw no 'Amis o Cikatopay hananay, yo herek no lalood I Cepo' I 1878 mihecaan maliposak oasitimol maro' i Tapowaray,Makerahay,Ciwkangan, Sa'aniwan ato Madawdaw. == Pacefaday a Tilid ==
